office_does: The sheriff leads county law enforcement, emergency response, civil-process, staffing, and agency administration.
race_blurb: Undersheriff Calvin Dansereau faces deputy and search-and-rescue officer Kristopher Taylor; neither dossier supplies a directional public-safety platform.

candidates.summary: County undersheriff and field-training officer with current executive and training responsibility.

experience.basis: Current executive and field-training roles establish substantial direct agency experience.

candidates.summary: County deputy assigned to search and rescue with direct agency and emergency-response experience.

experience.basis: Current deputy and search-and-rescue service provide a directly relevant office record.
